column3:
An eau de parfum carved from smoke and leather. Royale Oud opens with a flash of saffron and pink pepper, then descends into the dense heart of Cambodian oud and smoked birchwood — softened only by patchouli, amber, and a whisper of tobacco. It is the throne piece of L'Arbre de Vie. Heavy. Regal. Worn after sundown.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.

column30: Royale Oud Eau de Parfum 50ml — Musk de Lumière
column31: Royale Oud — a smoked oud and leather signature from L'Arbre de Vie. Saffron, Cambodian oud, smoked birchwood, amber, tobacco. 50ml. Handcrafted in New Jersey.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column50: Cambodian Oud, Smoked Birchwood, Black Leather
column53: A throne carved from oud. Royale opens sharp and saffron-bright, then deepens into the smoke of burning birch and the leather of an old library chair. The base is patchouli warmed by amber and the dry sweetness of tobacco.
column54: An ode to the original oud houses — the courts where resin was burned for kings, where wood was older than memory.
column55: Royale — the French royal. The first and most regal of the four Roots. Worn by those who arrive last and stay longest.
column56: I built Royale around a single choice: real Cambodian oud, no compromises. Everything else exists to set it on a throne.
column62: 50ml black-frosted glass with brushed gold collar. The bottle absorbs light — an architectural object as much as a fragrance.
column63: Alcohol Denat. (40B), Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water). Allergens may include: Limonene, Linalool, Citronellol, Geraniol, Citral, Coumarin, Eugenol, Isoeugenol, Benzyl Benzoate, Farnesol, Benzyl Salicylate, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Alcohol.

column66: Saffron, Cambodian Oud, Smoked Birch, Leather, Amber, Tobacco

column3:
Sweetness held in the warmth of oud. Chérie opens with bergamot and cardamom, then folds into the dark gourmand of Indonesian oud, tonka bean, and vanilla orchid. The base is bourbon vanilla over sandalwood and benzoin. Tender. Magnetic. Worn close to the skin.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.
column5: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column7: L'Arbre de Vie, Les Racines, Oud, Eau de Parfum, Gourmand, Vanilla, Niche Fragrance, Luxury Perfume, Unisex, Chérie Oud
column30: Chérie Oud Eau de Parfum 50ml — Musk de Lumière
column31: Chérie Oud — vanilla and oud entwined. Bergamot, Indonesian oud, tonka, bourbon vanilla, sandalwood. From L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column50: Indonesian Oud, Tonka Bean, Vanilla Orchid
column53: Chérie is the warmest oud. The smoke is gentled by vanilla orchid and tonka — not dessert-sweet, but skin-sweet. The kind of warmth that makes someone lean closer.
column54: A love letter written in resin. Chérie was composed for the moment between a kiss and the next sentence.
column55: Chérie — beloved, in French. The intimate name of L'Arbre. Wear it for one person, or for yourself in private.
column56: The vanilla here is real Bourbon vanilla absolute, not synthetic. It costs more, but it lives on skin the way no aroma chemical can.
column60: Date Night, Intimate Settings, Cold Weather
column62: 50ml black-frosted glass with brushed gold collar. Same architecture as the rest of L'Arbre de Vie.
column63: Alcohol Denat. (40B), Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water). Allergens may include: Limonene, Linalool, Citronellol, Geraniol, Citral, Coumarin, Eugenol, Isoeugenol, Benzyl Benzoate, Farnesol, Benzyl Salicylate, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Alcohol.
column64: Made in Parsippany, New Jersey · USA
column65: Layer over Royale Oud to soften the smoke, or wear alone for a complete gourmand statement.

column3:
Powder over silk over leather. Sultanat opens with iris pallida and pink pepper, opens into Hindi oud cradled by amberwood and rose, and settles on a base of powdered iris, sandalwood, and white musk. The most ceremonial of the Roots — the one that lingers like incense in a room hours after you've gone.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.
column5: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance

column30: Sultanat Oud Eau de Parfum 50ml — Musk de Lumière
column31: Sultanat Oud — Hindi oud wrapped in iris powder and amberwood. Ceremonial. Powdered. From L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column53: Sultanat smells like a room in which someone has burned oud and iris together for a very long time. There is no sharpness — only the velvet that comes after the smoke clears.
column54: Inspired by the courts of the Levant — the floors strewn with rose petals, the air thick with bakhoor, the powder of dried iris in the corners.
column55: Sultanat — the sultanate. The court. A name for the fragrance that carries the most ceremony.
column56: Hindi oud is darker and earthier than Cambodian. I balanced it with iris pallida — the powder softens what oud alone makes austere.
column60: Formal Events, Cool Evenings, Important Gatherings
column62: 50ml black-frosted glass with brushed gold collar.

column3:
The Empress of L'Arbre. Damask and Bulgarian roses opening over Turkish rose absolute, Cambodian oud, and saffron. The base is patchouli, oud wood, and vanilla — heavy, regal, indelible. A rose that does not whisper.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.
column5: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance

column31: Impériale Oud — Turkish rose absolute over Cambodian oud and saffron. The Empress of L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column49: Damask Rose, Bulgarian Rose, Pink Pepper
column50: Turkish Rose Absolute, Cambodian Oud, Saffron
column53: Three roses braided together over the body of an oud. Saffron threads it gold. Patchouli holds the floor. The result is a rose that walks into a room and takes it.
column54: The Empress and her oud. A composition built around the question: how loud can a rose become before it is no longer a rose?
column55: Impériale — imperial. The most commanding of the four Roots. Named for the way it does not negotiate.
column56: I used three different roses because no single rose could carry the weight. Damask for brightness, Bulgarian for body, Turkish absolute for the indelible base.

column3:
An ocean held in glass. Sea salt and Calabrian bergamot break against a heart of iris, lily of the valley, and white cedar. Driftwood, ambergris, and white musk close it — clean, vast, slightly cold. The fragrance of a coastline at first light.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.
column5: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column7: L'Arbre de Vie, Les Branches, Aquatic, Floral, Marine, Iris, Eau de Parfum, Niche Fragrance, Luxury Perfume, Unisex, Paradis de Bleu
column30: Paradis de Bleu Eau de Parfum 50ml — Musk de Lumière
column31: Paradis de Bleu — sea salt, iris, driftwood, ambergris. The aquatic floral of L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column49: Sea Salt, Calabrian Bergamot, Marine Accord
column50: Iris, Lily of the Valley, White Cedar
column53: Paradis is what salt smells like before it dries — that interval where the air is heavy with water and cold light. The iris keeps it from being just a beach scent. The driftwood gives it a body.
column54: A morning on the Mediterranean coast in early spring. The water still cold, the sun not yet warm.
column55: Paradis de Bleu — Blue Paradise. Named for the blue hour, the moment between night and morning.
column56: Real ambergris in trace amounts. It is the only material that carries seawater the way seawater actually smells.
column62: 50ml black-frosted glass with brushed gold collar.

column3:
Néroli that does not fade with the sun. Tunisian néroli over bergamot and petitgrain, opening into orange blossom absolute, jasmine sambac, and honeyed magnolia. The base is white musk, cedarwood, and tonka — soft, lit from within, made for the hours after dark.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.
column5: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column7: L'Arbre de Vie, Les Branches, Floral, Citrus, Neroli, Orange Blossom, Eau de Parfum, Niche Fragrance, Luxury Perfume, Unisex, Néroli de Nuit
column30: Néroli de Nuit Eau de Parfum 50ml — Musk de Lumière
column31: Néroli de Nuit — Tunisian néroli, orange blossom absolute, jasmine sambac, white musk. From L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column47: Floral Citrus — White Florals at Dusk
column50: Orange Blossom Absolute, Jasmine Sambac, Honeyed Magnolia
column53: Most néroli scents are bright and brief. This one is dimmed deliberately — petitgrain gives it green shadow, tonka anchors the warmth, and the white musk holds it on skin past midnight.
column54: A garden in southern Tunisia just after sunset. The orange trees are still warm but the air is cooling. The whites smell more like white in the dark.
column55: Néroli de Nuit — Néroli at Night. The reformulation of néroli for the part of the day it usually disappears in.
column56: Tunisian néroli is more honeyed than Moroccan or Egyptian. I chose it because the base of this fragrance needed something to hold onto.

column3:
A dream that lingers after waking. Saffron and pink pepper open over pear and Bulgarian rose, dropping into heliotrope, honeyed magnolia, and a warm base of amber, vanilla, and white musk. The lightest of the eight signatures, but the one that stays in memory longest.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.

column31: Hayal — saffron, rose, heliotrope, amber, vanilla. The dream of L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column53: Hayal is the in-between scent — soft enough to wear in the day, warm enough to wear at night. Saffron at the top gives it a thread of gold. The base is amber held in vanilla.
column54: Named for the Turkish word for dream. A scent meant to feel like the impression of a memory rather than the memory itself.
column55: Hayal — dream, in Turkish and Arabic. The most poetic name in the line. The bottle that gets reached for when the day asks for softness.
column56: Heliotrope is an underused note in modern perfumery. It carries powder, almond, and a faint vanilla — it makes Hayal feel like a memory rather than a statement.

column3:
Morning. Stillness. Skin. Rosée opens with lychee, bergamot, and aldehydes — clean as cold water. The heart is white rose, magnolia, and powdered iris. The base is white musk, sandalwood, and cashmere wood. A second-skin floral. Worn close.

50ml Eau de Parfum. Crafted in Parsippany, New Jersey.

column30: Rosée Blanche Eau de Parfum 50ml — Musk de Lumière
column31: Rosée Blanche — white rose, magnolia, powdered iris, white musk. The skin-scent of L'Arbre de Vie. 50ml.
column32: Health & Beauty > Personal Care > Cosmetics > Fragrance
column53: A second-skin scent — the kind of fragrance someone has to be close to notice. Cashmere wood is the secret: it makes the whole composition feel like worn linen, soft and intimate.
column54: The dew on white roses at dawn. A scent designed to be inseparable from the wearer's own skin.
column55: Rosée Blanche — White Dew. The most quiet of the eight. The one worn for oneself.
column56: Cashmere wood is one of the most sophisticated bases in modern perfumery — it makes white musks feel three-dimensional rather than laundered.
column60: Daily Wear, Office, Morning, Skin-Scent Layering
column62: 50ml black-frosted glass with brushed gold collar.

column64: Made in Parsippany, New Jersey · USA
column65: A perfect base layer beneath any of the four Roots — softens the smoke, keeps the oud civilized.
